# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `FR-003`
- Title: `Deliver reliable consultant contact conversion path`
- Persona/Actor: `Small-business prospect ready to discuss an automation problem`
- Value statement: `For small-business prospects, deliver a reliable contact path to achieve low-friction consultation requests.`
- Context: `User reaches contact from navigation or primary CTAs after reviewing services and projects.`
- Problem statement: `A generic or unclear contact flow reduces inquiry confidence and prevents qualified leads from taking action.`
- Expected outcome: `Contact page is always reachable and clearly explains how to start a conversation and what response timing to expect.`
- Success metric(s): `All contact routes and CTA links pass navigation checks on key pages and mobile/desktop breakpoints.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Top-level navigation contains a contact entry.`
  - `Contact section includes at least one direct channel and clear response expectation text for consultation requests.`
  - `Contact copy reinforces consultant positioning for AI, automation, and software problem solving.`
  - `All contact entry points resolve correctly on desktop and mobile breakpoints.`
- Non-goals: `Server-side form processing, CRM integration, spam scoring workflows.`
- Constraints: `No secret exposure, static-first implementation in Phase 1.`
- Dependencies: `FR-001 hero CTA behavior, accessibility checks.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Assumes contact channels are finalized by content owner before release.`
- Validation approach: `Playwright navigation smoke test, responsive viewport checks, accessibility checks on contact section.`
- Priority score: `92`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#FR-003`
  - ADR: `adr/0001-static-first-baseline.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
